title: Comparison of Symbian devices
body: This is a list of devices that run on the Symbian platform mobile operating system (Symbian^1, Symbian^2, and Symbian^3), including their proprietary predecessors running on Symbian OS and EPOC.
categories: All articles that may contain original research
